responsibilities: Built a full-stack AI movie summary platform (HollywoodAI) using Next.js 14, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Firebase, and Stripe, implementing subscription-based authentication and AI-generated content delivery.

Developed and deployed a full-stack social media application using Next.js, TypeScript, and Firebase, implementing email/password, sign up, and guest login authentication with features protected behind authenticated routes.

Built real-time post creation, likes, and comments using Firebase Firestore, managing global auth and UI state with Redux and styling a responsive layout — sidebar, post feed, and widgets — with Tailwind CSS.
Transformed a static NFT marketplace into a dynamic, interactive UI with Swiper carousels, skeleton loading states, and real-time Firestore data using React and Firebase.
Managed Git workflows including feature branching, pull requests, and resolving merge conflicts across multiple team branches.
